title: Staff schedules in Monday
excerpt: Can anyone point me in the right direction of using the calendar view for our daily staff schedule?  We do not want to use a third party app including google calendar.  I have only figured out how to see someone schedule…

posts.author: CStevenson (Carola Stevenson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Can anyone point me in the right direction of using the calendar view for our daily staff schedule? We do not want to use a third party app including google calendar. I have only figured out how to see someone scheduled in the day view, but we need to see the hour by hour schedule for our 20 staff. We would want to see them by department, Start times, end times and lunch hour.
Thank you

posts.author: Charlie_F (Charlie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @CStevenson , if you create a calendar view, you can change the view from day, to week, to month. Here is an instruction on how to use the calendar view: https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360001262965-The-Calendar-View-and-Widget

Here is the day view

image1501×769 52.6 KB

Here is the month view

image1509×768 62 KB

Here is Gantt chart view

image1423×778 80.3 KB

If you have additional questions, please feel free to reach out! Here is my contact form: Consultation Request Form

Charlie
